title: pachycereus militaris
intro: Pachycereus militaris, also known as the "century plant," is a species of cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Pachycereus militaris include reducing inflammation, fighting off bacterial infections, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the stems or flowers in hot water to create a tea or by drying the plant material to create a powder that can be used in supplements or capsules.
